responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain scalable and secure data pipelines across cloud and on-prem environments.
Integrate data from ERP (e.g., SAP), BI platforms (e.g., SAC), and external sources into centralized data lakes or warehouses.
Optimize ETL/ELT processes for performance, reliability, and cost-efficiency.
Define and implement data quality rules, validation checks, and cleansing routines.
Partner with data scientists and analysts to operationalize AI/ML models.

must_have: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or related field.
Minimum 5-6 years of experience in data engineering, analytics, or AI/ML implementation.
Strong proficiency in SQL, Python, Spark, and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP).
Experience with data quality tools, governance frameworks, and metadata management.
Excellent communication, problem-solving, and stakeholder management skills.
